conservative.name: Oath of Truth
conservative.requirements: 5 favour. You and/or the target intone an oath over a symbol of law, authority, or Verena. This requires a prepare manoeuvre

success.description: As above, and you and the target both recover 1 stress

boon.description: Special: The target may voluntarily agree to take the oath. If so, then do not roll for this action: it is automatically successful with no or effects

chaosStar.description: You believe the blessing to have been invoked successfully

reckless.name: Oath of Truth
reckless.requirements: 5 favour. You and/or the target intone an oath over a symbol or law, authority, or Verena. This requires a prepare manoeuvre

success.description: As above, and the target suffers 1 stress

boon.description: Special: The target may voluntarily agree to take the oath. If so, then do not roll for this action: it is automatically successful with no or

chaosStar.description: You believe the blessing to have been invoked successfully
